languages.text: Эоганн хочет обсудить Нунциуса. Он ждет Вольного Торговца на мостике.
Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.
languages.original_text: Эоганн хочет обсудить Нунциуса. Он ждет Вольного Торговца на мостике.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.

languages.text: Eogunn quiere hablar sobre Nuncius. Espera a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente en el puente.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn quiere hablar sobre Nuncius. Espera a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente en el puente.

languages.text: 伊奥贡希望能谈谈努恩修斯的事。此刻，他正在舰桥上等待行商浪人。
languages.original_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡希望能谈谈努恩修斯的事。此刻，他正在舰桥上等待行商浪人。

languages.text: Eogunn souhaite discuter du cas de Nuncius. Il attend {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} sur la passerelle.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn souhaite discuter du cas de Nuncius. Il attend {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} sur la passerelle.

languages.text: Eogunn, Nuncius konusunu konuşmak istiyor. Hür Tacir'i köprüde bekliyor.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, Nuncius konusunu konuşmak istiyor. Hür Tacir'i köprüde bekliyor.

languages.text: Eogunn möchte über Nuncius reden. Er erwartet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} auf der Brücke.
languages.original_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn möchte über Nuncius reden. Er erwartet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} auf der Brücke.

languages.text: エオグンがヌンシウスについて話したいと言っている。彼はブリッジでローグ・トレーダーを待っている。
languages.original_text: Eogunn wishes to discuss Nuncius. He is waiting for the Rogue Trader on the bridge.
